summary.shape_sentence: Early upside fakeout into a strong morning selloff, long midday base, 14:00 reversal attempt, then weak sideways-to-lower close.

goat.note: Main directional expansion was the 10:00–11:05 selloff from the failed morning high into the lower distribution.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots aligned with failed bounces after the morning HOD and again near the late-afternoon lower high.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots acted as countertrend reversal attempts near the 11:05 breakdown low and the 13:50–14:00 LOD flush.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 25640–25670 was respected late; higher supply near 25790–25820 remained unreclaimed after the morning breakdown.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand near 25540 held during lunch but broke before 14:00; deeper demand near 25485 was defended and launched the afternoon recovery.

time_markers.10am_blue: Failed upside had transitioned into heavy sell pressure; the main downside trend leg was underway.
time_markers.12pm_red: Price was balancing near the lower half of the range after the morning breakdown.
time_markers.2pm_green: LOD/reversal zone; sellers flushed below lunch support, then buyers reclaimed.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 25600.75, off the lows but still materially below the open and HOD.

takeaway: Bearish failed-breakout day: early upside probe rejected, morning trend leg delivered the main opportunity, lunch formed low balance, and the 14:00 flush created only a partial recovery that failed below supply.
